completed_tasks.name: Extract PlaylistGenerator interface, expand PlaylistViewModel, add PlaylistViewModelTest
Create PlaylistScreen composable and wire into MainActivity
Install fixed build on device and verify Looper fix works
completed_tasks.progress: Installed via ./gradlew :app:installDebug. Generation ran to completion — no more 'No internet' misclassification. Looper fix confirmed. Hit quota at playlist insertion step (6,650/10,000 units used today, 2026-03-27).

remaining_tasks.name: Wait for YouTube quota reset, run one clean generation
Verify AliMusings populated with songs, then approve Phase 4 checkpoint

blockers.description: YouTube Data API daily quota exhausted. As of 2026-03-27 ~08:40 CT, 6,650/10,000 units used. Not enough headroom for another full run (~9,850 units needed).
blockers.workaround: Wait for quota reset (midnight Pacific). Check https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/api/youtube.googleapis.com/quotas — look for usage to drop back to ~0.

human_actions_pending.action: After quota resets: launch app (fixed build already installed), tap Generate Playlist, verify AliMusings is populated with songs
human_actions_pending.context: Fixed build installed (commit 96f2c74). Both bugs confirmed fixed. Generation runs fully through YouTube search phase — only blocked on quota. No code changes needed. An empty 'AliMusings' playlist may exist from previous partial run — next successful run will replace it.

human_actions_pending.action: After successful generation, type 'confirmed fixed' to close Phase 4 checkpoint
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 4 completes after checkpoint approval -> gsd:verify-work -> ROADMAP advances to Phase 5 (polish/cache)

decisions.decision: Fix AuthRepositoryImpl.refreshAccessToken() with withContext(Dispatchers.Main) for AppAuth performTokenRequest
decisions.rationale: AppAuth creates an Android Handler internally requiring a Looper. OkHttp interceptor threads have no Looper, causing RuntimeException wrapped as IOException, misclassified as NetworkError ('No internet connection').

decisions.decision: Fix YouTubeRepositoryImpl.deletePlaylist() to only swallow 404, not all exceptions via runCatching
decisions.rationale: Original runCatching silently hid 403/401 errors from deletePlaylist. Now only 404 (playlist already gone) is suppressed; quota/auth errors propagate correctly.

next_action: Check quota at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/api/youtube.googleapis.com/quotas — when usage shows ~0, launch app (already installed), tap Generate Playlist, and wait for success. Then type 'confirmed fixed'.
context_notes: Phase 4 is functionally complete. Both bugs found during UAT are fixed and committed (96f2c74). Fixed build is installed on device and confirmed working — generation runs all the way through YouTube search (6,500 units), then hits quota at the playlist-insert phase. An empty 'AliMusings' playlist may exist from a previous partial run. No code changes needed. Pure quota wait.
